overview: MAW (Mobile Accessories Warehouse) is a complete enterprise ecosystem platform with 6 portals: Admin dashboard, Collaboration/vendor registration, Customer e-commerce storefront, Warehouse Manager, Delivery management, and Support ticketing. Each portal has its own professional layout, navigation, KPI dashboards, and sample data.
features: Admin dashboard with charts, vendor management, product and analytics pages
Customer e-commerce storefront with home, products, cart, checkout, orders, wishlist, profile
Collaboration portal for vendor registration and application status
Warehouse Manager portal with shipments, inventory, and dispatch
Delivery portal with delivery list, detail, and OTP confirmation
Support portal with ticketing system and live chat UI
Smooth page transitions and animated KPI counters
Dark sidebar theme for admin/manager/delivery, light theme for customer/collaboration/support
Role-based access and protected routes via authorization extension
